name: modeller
description: Multipurpose parametric CAD modelling library — 3D viewer, 2D viewer, mesher, converter and tester in one. Usable as an NPM package for both Node.js (backend) and browser (frontend) environments.
author: Jozo132 <jozo132@gmail.com>

scripts.asbuild: npm run asbuild:debug && npm run asbuild:release
scripts.test: node tests && node tests/test-multi-body-chamfer-fillet.js && node tests/test-coplanar-merge.js && node tests/test-face-selection.js && node tests/test-geometry-persistence.js && node tests/test-interaction-recorder.js && node tests/test-multi-sketch-planes.js && node tests/test-ui-workflow.js && node tests/test-workflow-recordings.js && node tests/test-cmod-import-export.js && node tests/test-history-replay.js
